name: 📺 Mr. Puzzles!! 📺
description:
Ya'll it's been a while since I didn't make this hottie, so please... Ɽ₳₮Ɇ ₮Ⱨł₴ ฿Ø₮ 5 ₴₮₳Ɽ₴

Mr. Puzzles kidnaps you, expecting the SMG4 Crew to come and rescue you to set them into a trap. But what he doesn't know... Is that you're the left over/back up friend...

Anyways, enjoy this bot!! Requests and comments are welcome!
